headline: Woman's 'Hot Girl Summer' Is Just Her Sitting In A Parking Lot With A Smoothie And A Dream
summary: 'I'm manifesting adventure,' Amanda said. The security guard has stopped asking. He's 'invested in her journey.'
fullBody: Amanda HotGirlParking has been 'living her best life' in the same Target parking lot for 3 weeks. 'I'm in my era,' Amanda said. The security guard, Greg, has started bringing her snacks. 'She's here every day,' Greg said. Amanda has a playlist called 'Parking Lot Paradise.' Her friends are concerned. 'I think she lives there now,' one said. Amanda has a folding chair. 'It's about the energy,' she said. The energy is confused.
